creator: Jacobus.Geluk@gmail.com
text:
You are right, I have to/will fix this... Thanks.

On Feb 10, 2008 11:48 PM, Johan StrÃ¶m <johan@stromnet.se> wrote:

> Hello,
>
> I just tried to build this port (extracted it myself) in a non-jail
> environment:
>
> ===>  Checking security.jail.sysvipc_allowed: 0
> openamq-1.2c4: You can not build this port in a jail that has
> sysvipc_allowed=0
> openamq-1.2c4: Try "sysctl security.jail.sysvipc_allowed=1"
>
> No problem for me to enable it in my case but maybe one shouldn't
> check it if we are not running jailed?
>
> Except for that the port built fine! Thanks
>
> --
> Johan StrÃ¶m
> Stromnet
> johan@stromnet.se
> http://www.stromnet.se/
>
>
>

Met vriendelijke groet,
Jacobus Geluk
